introSection: Achtbaan is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Mini Mundi in Middelburg, Zealand, Netherlands.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a steam train with a face. This is a standard traindesign for the product.

fullText:
Achtbaan is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Mini Mundi in Middelburg, Zealand, Netherlands.



Orange track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble a steam train with a face. This is a standard traindesign for the product.
